headline: Transcript: Google closes in on Nvidia in the AI race
summary: Marc Filippino talks to Nikou Asgari and John Foley
body_text:
This is an audio transcript of the FT News Briefing podcast episode: ‘Google closes in on Nvidia in the AI race’

Marc FilippinoGood morning from the Financial Times. Today is Wednesday, November 26th, and this is your FT News Briefing. Nvidia may no longer be the belle of the AI ball and US economic data is telling us that retailers aren’t feeling the holiday spirit. Plus what is the opposite of to the moon? Because whatever it is, that’s what crypto is doing right now.

Nikou AsgariCompanies and executives have been like, if we are holding lots of crypto, our share price will go up. But now the trend is really rapidly unravelling.

Marc FilippinoI’m Marc Filippino, and here’s the news you need to start your day.

[MUSIC PLAYING]

Google’s parent company almost reached a $4tn market capitalisation yesterday. That would be a new record. Alphabet has had a crazy run since early September after an antitrust judge ruled in its favour and the company’s artificial intelligence offerings hav
